question: Analyzing the performance index by year, which statement is most accurate?

options.A: The performance index in 2018 was higher than in 2020.
options.B: The index increased steadily every year from 2018 to 2022.
options.C: The index was the same in 2021 and 2022.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is below the data maximum, so the top bars are truncated and appear equal.
